text:
EXPLANATION: The Gurobi Optimizer Reference Manual is the official technical documentation for the Gurobi Optimizer software, published and updated regularly by Gurobi Optimization, LLC. It is a valid, real-world source and a standard technical reference for the software, often cited in academic work.
LINK: https://www.gurobi.com/documentation/
FOUND_TITLE: Gurobi Optimizer Reference Manual
FOUND_AUTHORS: Gurobi Optimization, LLC
FOUND_YEAR: 2024
VERDICT: UNLIKELY
